nolan.name: Christopher Nolan

visual_style.color_description: Muted blue-grey tones with desaturated warmth. Deep shadows, cold steel, occasional warm amber for emotional beats. High contrast between light and dark.
visual_style.lighting: High contrast, practical lighting feel. Silhouettes against bright backgrounds. Golden hour for emotional scenes. Cold blue for tension.
visual_style.grain: Subtle film grain, IMAX large-format feel

editing_style.pacing: Deliberate, building tension. Cross-cutting between timelines. Slow build to crescendo.
editing_style.rhythm: Methodical escalation. Quiet moments punctuated by sudden intensity.

audio_mood.score_feel: Bass-heavy, building drones (Zimmer-inspired). Ticking clock motifs. Organ swells. Minimal melody, maximum tension.
audio_mood.dialogue_style: Measured, philosophical. Characters explain big ideas through personal stakes.

nolan.prompt_modifier: Cinematic IMAX-quality composition, muted blue-grey color grading, high contrast shadows, symmetrical framing, vast environments dwarfing characters, Christopher Nolan inspired visual style, film grain texture, practical lighting feel

cameron.name: James Cameron

visual_style.color_description: Rich blue-teal color grading. Bioluminescent accents. Warm golden light for intimate moments. Saturated, vibrant palette.
visual_style.lighting: Volumetric lighting, god rays through water/atmosphere. Rim lighting on characters. Blue-teal key light.

editing_style.pacing: Patient world-building, then accelerating action. Emotional peaks with sweeping music.
editing_style.rhythm: Long takes for immersion, rapid cutting for action sequences

audio_mood.score_feel: Orchestral, sweeping, emotional. Horns and strings for grandeur. Intimate piano for personal moments. James Horner / Simon Franglen inspired.
audio_mood.dialogue_style: Direct, emotional. Characters wear their hearts. Memorable one-liners in action.

cameron.prompt_modifier: Epic cinematic scale, rich blue-teal color grading, volumetric god rays, sweeping camera movement, vast alien or natural landscapes, James Cameron inspired visual grandeur, sharp high-resolution clarity, bioluminescent accents

ritchie.name: Guy Ritchie
filmography_refs: Lock Stock and Two Smoking Barrels

visual_style.color_description: Desaturated, gritty. British overcast tones with occasional warm pub-light amber. High contrast, slightly bleached highlights.
visual_style.lighting: Natural overcast light. Harsh tungsten interiors. Dramatic side-lighting for character intros. Smoke/haze in the air.
visual_style.grain: Heavy film grain, slightly degraded look

editing_style.pacing: Rapid-fire. Quick cuts. Freeze-frame character intros with name cards. Rewinding and replaying scenes from different perspectives.
editing_style.rhythm: Machine-gun pacing for dialogue scenes, sudden slow-motion for dramatic beats

audio_mood.score_feel: British rock/indie soundtrack. Punchy drums. Bass-heavy. Occasional classical music for ironic contrast.
audio_mood.dialogue_style: Fast, overlapping, slang-heavy. Witty one-liners. Characters talk AT each other. Voice-over narration common.

ritchie.prompt_modifier: Gritty desaturated British crime aesthetic, heavy film grain, dramatic side-lighting through smoke, low-angle compositions, Guy Ritchie inspired visual style, high contrast, amber tungsten interiors, overcast natural light

maniratnam.name: Mani Ratnam

visual_style.color_description: Warm golden tones. Rich earth colors. Lush greens in nature. Deep teals for night. Painterly quality to every frame.
visual_style.lighting: Golden hour magic. Dappled light through trees. Oil lamp warmth. Soft diffused light for romance. Dramatic backlighting for silhouettes.

editing_style.pacing: Lyrical, flowing. Music-driven montages. Patient emotional buildup. Poetic transitions between scenes.
editing_style.rhythm: Measured and musical. Scenes breathe. Action punctuated by stillness.

audio_mood.score_feel: AR Rahman-inspired fusion. Indian classical meets electronic. Soulful vocals. Flute and strings. Rhythmic percussion building to crescendo.
audio_mood.dialogue_style: Poetic, layered. Subtext over text. Characters communicate through glances and gestures as much as words.

maniratnam.prompt_modifier: Warm golden-hour cinematography, lush painterly frames, silhouettes against dramatic skies, rain-soaked poetic compositions, Mani Ratnam inspired visual poetry, rich earth tones, dappled light through trees, architectural framing

nelson.name: Nelson Dilipkumar

visual_style.color_description: Bold, saturated, almost pop-art at times. High contrast blacks and vivid accent colors. Neon highlights against dark backgrounds.
visual_style.lighting: Stylized colored lighting. Neon accents. High contrast. Dramatic spotlighting for character reveals. Practical neon/LED sources.
visual_style.grain: Clean and sharp with intentional color push

editing_style.pacing: Playful but controlled. Builds comedy then snaps to tension. Unexpected tonal shifts.
editing_style.rhythm: Rhythmic and musical. Comedy beats land like drum hits. Twist reveals held for maximum impact.

audio_mood.score_feel: Anirudh Ravichander-inspired. Heavy bass drops, catchy hooks, folk-electronic fusion. BGM that makes moments iconic.
audio_mood.dialogue_style: Witty, punchline-driven. Characters speak in memorable one-liners. Dark humor delivered deadpan.

nelson.prompt_modifier: Bold saturated colors with neon accents, high contrast dramatic lighting, center-frame character compositions, stylized pop-art aesthetic, Nelson Dilipkumar inspired visual style, dramatic low-angle hero shots, vibrant color-blocked scenes
